A=c(1,2)
A
P=matrix(A, nrow=1, ncol=2)
P
B=c(1,2,-2,-1)
B
Q=matrix(B, nrow=2, ncol=2)
Q
Mean_vector=c(4,3,2,1)
Mean_vector
R=matrix(A1, nrow=1, ncol=4)
R
Cov_x=(c(3,0,2,2,0,1,1,0,2,1,9,-2,2,0,-2,4))
Cov_x
S=matrix(A2, nrow=4, ncol=4)
S
E_X1=Mean_vector[1:2]
E_X1
E_X2=Mean_vector[3:4]
E_X2
E_AX1=t(A)%*%E_X1
E_AX1
E_BX2=Q%*%E_X2
E_BX2
Cov_X1=S[1:2,1:2]
Cov_X1
Cov_X2=S[3:4,3:4]
Cov_X2
Cov_X1X2=S[1:2,3:4]
Cov_X1X2
Cov_AX1=P%*%Cov_X1%*%t(P)
Cov_AX1
Cov_BX2=Q%*%Cov_X2%*%t(Q)
Cov_BX2
Cov_AX1BX2=P%*%Cov_X1X2%*%Q
Cov_AX1BX2
